constraints.name: requireMinimumQuantity
constraints.message: Minimum quantity must be at least 1

constraints.name: requireRuleType
constraints.message: Rule type must be discount, free_shipping, or threshold

constraints.name: requireAction
constraints.message: Action must be discount or free_shipping

constraints.name: validDiscount
constraints.message: Discount percent must be between 0 and 100

constraints.name: warnNoDiscount
constraints.messageTemplate: Bulk order rule '{ruleName}' has discount action but 0% discount — verify this is intentional

value.value: Minimum quantity must be at least 1
Discount percent must be between 0 and 100

constraints.name: warnDiscountIncrease
constraints.messageTemplate: Discount increased from {oldPct}% to {newPct}% for rule '{ruleName}'

value.value: Minimum quantity must be at least 1
Discount percent must be between 0 and 100
Cannot adjust priority of a deleted rule
